creator: sirdice@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 251028
Update to 5.005, add IGNORE and missing dependencies

Right, that was easy to overlook in a wall of text. It also complained about libunwind, added that too. 

Also tried to fix p5-Module-CoreList but that turned a notice into a warning.  Not sure if I did it properly or if it's actually needed right now, so I left it as is.

s better results when using it, especially with older Perl versions.
